data.body:
Done — fork commit 652f4e2 on navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template@main. Evidence:
- Copier rendered with app_name={{PROJECT_NAME}} (via sentinel substitution; copier.yml's regex validator forbids braces in app_name, so rendered with sentinel and post-processed)
- App at root (subdir layout flattened per SC2)
- SC2 strip-list grep verification: `git grep -E 'nava-platform|\.copier-answers|^copier\.yml$|template-only-(bin|docs)|code\.json'` returns 0 matches
- Stripped: copier.yml, code.json, renovate.json, CODEOWNERS, SECURITY.md, template/, template-only-bin/, template-only-docs/, .copier-answers
- Rendered CI workflows removed (story 0096-eb93 will provide DSO ci.yml)
- Commit URL: https://github.com/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template/commit/652f4e2

Note: SC2 conditions (b)-(f) — replacement CODEOWNERS, SECURITY.md, ci.yml, npm install/run dev validation — are jointly delivered with story 0096-eb93 (DSO infra baking).
